products.title_en: CNC Tool Vending Machine - Smart CNC Tool Cabinet for Tool Inventory Management
products.description_en: This CNC Tool Vending Machine is designed for CNC machining workshops, machine shops and tool rooms to manage cutting tools and MRO supplies at the point of use. It supports controlled dispensing, tool issuing records, return tracking, low-stock alerts and inventory reports for end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders and other CNC tools. The 48 side lockers can also be used for used tool return, large tool storage, PPE, spare parts and customized material management.
products.features_en:
• Manage CNC cutting tools such as end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools and tool holders
• 80 independent dispensing channels for standard tool storage and controlled issuing
• 48 side lockers for used tool return, large tools, spare parts, PPE and special items
• Support employee card, face recognition, PIN code and QR code access
• Real-time inventory tracking and automatic tool usage records
• Low-stock alerts for timely tool replenishment
• Track tool usage by employee, machine, department or cost center
• Support ERP, MES, SAP and tool management system integration
• Suitable for CNC workshops, machining centers, tool rooms and MRO inventory management
products.specs_en:
Product Model: DL80-48 / Customizable
Product Type: CNC Tool Vending Machine / Smart CNC Tool Cabinet
Overall Dimensions: 1800(H) × 1165(W) × 850(D) mm
Locker Size: 159(H) × 117(W) × 300(D) mm
Cabinet Color: Standard White / Customizable
Net Weight: Approx. 306 kg
Capacity: 80 independent channels + 48 side lockers
Storage Structure: 8 layers, 10 channels per layer; side locker module for large tools and return items
Managed Items: End mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders, gauges, PPE, spare parts and MRO supplies
Access Methods: Employee card, face recognition, PIN code, QR code
Software Functions: Inventory tracking, usage records, low-stock alerts, user permission management and report export
System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized
Application: CNC machining workshops, machine shops, tool rooms, manufacturing plants and MRO warehouses
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What tools can this CNC tool vending machine manage?
A1: It can manage end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders, gauges and other CNC cutting tools.

Q2: Can the side lockers be used for used tool return?
A2: Yes. The 48 side lockers can be used for used tool return, large tool storage, PPE, spare parts and other customized items.

Q3: Can the cabinet track who takes each tool?
A3: Yes. The system can record employee, item name, quantity, pickup time, return status, machine, department or cost center.

Q4: Can it remind us when tools are low in stock?
A4: Yes. Low-stock alerts can be set for each tool to support timely replenishment and avoid production delays.

Q5: Can this tool vending machine connect with ERP or MES?
A5: Yes. ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be integrated according to project requirements.

products.title_en: DL80F Tool Vending Auxiliary Cabinet for CNC Cutting Tool Storage Expansion
products.description_en:
The DL80F CNC Tool Vending Auxiliary Cabinet is designed to expand the storage capacity of a CNC tool vending system. It works together with a master control cabinet and can support one-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet combinations. This model is suitable for CNC workshops, machine shops and tool rooms that need to store more cutting tools without adding another independent control unit.

The DL80F can be used for end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders and other CNC tooling items. It helps factories build a flexible tool management system with higher storage capacity, controlled issuing, usage records and low-stock alerts through the main cabinet software.
products.features_en:
• Auxiliary cabinet for expanding CNC tool vending machine capacity
• Connects with a master cabinet to build one-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet systems
• Suitable for end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools and tool holders
• Increases tool storage capacity without adding another independent control screen
• Controlled tool dispensing through the main cabinet system
• Supports automatic tool issuing records and inventory tracking
• Low-stock alerts help maintain enough cutting tool inventory
• Cabinet size, channel quantity and storage layout can be customized
• Suitable for CNC workshops, tool rooms, machine shops and MRO storage areas
products.specs_en:
Model: DL80F
Product Type: CNC Tool Vending Auxiliary Cabinet / Tool Vending Expansion Cabinet
Function: Capacity expansion for CNC tool vending system
Overall Dimensions: 1800(H) × 800(W) × 850(D) mm
Cabinet Color: Standard White / Customizable
Storage Structure: Multi-layer tool dispensing channels
Managed Items: End mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders, gauges and spare tools
Control Method: Connected and managed by master cabinet
System Combination: One master cabinet can connect with one or more auxiliary cabinets
Software Functions: Tool issuing records, inventory tracking, user permission management, low-stock alerts and report export
Customization: Cabinet size, channel quantity, internal layout and managed item types can be customized
Application: CNC machining workshops, machine shops, tool rooms, manufacturing plants and MRO warehouses
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What is the DL80F auxiliary cabinet used for?
A1: The DL80F is used to expand the storage capacity of a CNC tool vending system. It works with a master cabinet and does not require a separate control screen.

Q2: Can one master cabinet connect with more than one DL80F cabinet?
A2: Yes. The system can support one-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet combinations according to the project requirements.

Q3: What tools can be stored in the DL80F cabinet?
A3: It can store end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders, gauges and other CNC cutting tools.

Q4: Can the DL80F record tool usage?
A4: Yes. Tool issuing records, user information, inventory changes and low-stock alerts are managed through the master cabinet software.

Q5: Can the internal layout be customized?
A5: Yes. The channel quantity, storage layout and managed tool types can be customized based on the size and type of tools.

products.title_en: Industrial Tool Locker Cabinet for Tools, PPE, Spare Parts and MRO Supplies
products.description_en:
This Smart Tool Locker Cabinet is designed for factories, workshops, maintenance rooms and MRO warehouses that need to manage different types of tools and materials in separate compartments. Each locker can be assigned to a specific item, user group or department, helping companies control access and keep clear usage records.

It is suitable for industrial tools, hand tools, power tools, molds, PPE, safety supplies, spare parts, batteries, electrical parts, maintenance kits and other MRO materials. Locker size and layout can be customized according to the item size, making it a flexible solution for mixed-material inventory management.
products.features_en:
• Multi-compartment smart locker cabinet for mixed tool and material management
• Suitable for hand tools, power tools, molds, PPE, spare parts and MRO supplies
• Each compartment can store one item type or one customized material category
• Locker size, quantity and internal layout can be customized
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Automatic usage records for item pickup, return and inventory changes
• Supports permission management by employee, department or material category
• Low-stock alerts help improve replenishment efficiency
• Suitable for factories, workshops, maintenance rooms, tool rooms and MRO warehouses
products.specs_en:
Model:QT-G110
Product Type: Smart Tool Locker Cabinet / Industrial Tool Locker Cabinet
Storage Type: Multi-compartment locker cabinet
Cabinet Structure: Main control cabinet + locker storage area
Managed Items: Hand tools, power tools, molds, PPE, safety supplies, spare parts, batteries, electrical parts, maintenance kits and MRO supplies
Access Methods: Employee card, PIN code, QR code, face recognition / Customizable
Management Mode: Item pickup, item return, user permission control and inventory tracking
Software Functions: Usage records, stock alerts, user management, department management, report export and inventory analysis
Customization: Locker size, compartment quantity, cabinet color, storage layout and software workflow can be customized
Application: Manufacturing plants, tool rooms, maintenance rooms, workshops, MRO warehouses and production lines
System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can this smart tool locker cabinet manage?
A1: It can manage hand tools, power tools, molds, PPE, safety supplies, spare parts, batteries, electrical parts, maintenance kits and other MRO materials.

Q2: Can each locker store different items?
A2: Yes. Each compartment can be assigned to different item types, departments or user groups according to the management requirement.

Q3: Can the locker size be customized?
A3: Yes. The locker size, compartment quantity and internal layout can be customized based on the size of tools or materials.

Q4: Can it track who takes each item?
A4: Yes. The system can record user information, pickup time, item name, quantity, department and return status.

Q5: Is this cabinet suitable for MRO material management?
A5: Yes. It is suitable for MRO warehouses, maintenance rooms and production areas that manage tools, spare parts and consumables.

products.title_en: Modular Industrial Vending Machine for Tools, PPE and MRO Supplies
products.description_en:
This Modular Tool Vending System combines a CNC tool vending cabinet with smart locker cabinets to manage different types of industrial materials in one system. It is designed for factories, CNC workshops, tool rooms and MRO warehouses that need both cutting tool dispensing and multi-compartment storage.

The system can manage CNC cutting tools such as end mills, drills, taps and carbide inserts, while the locker modules can store PPE, spare parts, large tools, used tool returns, maintenance kits and other MRO supplies. It supports flexible one-master and multi-cabinet combinations, helping companies expand storage capacity and manage mixed materials through one software platform.
products.features_en:
• Modular tool vending system combining CNC tool cabinet and smart locker cabinets
• Suitable for CNC cutting tools, PPE, spare parts, large tools and MRO supplies
• One master cabinet can connect with auxiliary cabinets or locker cabinets for capacity expansion
• Supports cutting tool dispensing, locker storage and used tool return in one system
• Flexible cabinet combination for one-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet layouts
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Automatic usage records for tool issuing, item pickup, return and inventory changes
• Low-stock alerts help reduce production downtime and improve replenishment planning
• Software can track usage by employee, machine, department or cost center
• Cabinet size, locker quantity, channel layout and managed item categories can be customized
products.specs_en:
Product Type: Modular Tool Vending System / Combined Smart Cabinet System
System Structure: Main control cabinet + CNC tool vending cabinet + smart locker cabinets / Customizable
Cabinet Combination: One-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet system
Managed Items: End mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders, PPE, spare parts, large tools, used tools, maintenance kits and MRO supplies
Storage Modules: CNC tool dispensing channels, auxiliary tool cabinet, smart locker compartments and side storage modules
Access Methods: Employee card, PIN code, QR code, face recognition / Customizable
Management Mode: Tool issuing, item pickup, used tool return, inventory tracking and permission control
Software Functions: User management, item management, usage records, low-stock alerts, return records, report export and inventory analysis
Customization: Cabinet quantity, locker size, storage layout, cabinet color, software workflow and managed item categories can be customized
Application: CNC machining workshops, tool rooms, manufacturing plants, maintenance rooms and MRO warehouses
System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What is a modular tool vending system?
A1: It is a combined smart cabinet system that connects CNC tool vending cabinets, auxiliary cabinets and smart locker cabinets under one management platform.

Q2: What materials can this system manage?
A2: It can manage CNC cutting tools, PPE, spare parts, large tools, used tool returns, maintenance kits and other MRO supplies.

Q3: Can one master cabinet connect with several cabinets?
A3: Yes. The system can support one-to-two, one-to-three or multi-cabinet combinations depending on storage capacity and site layout.

Q4: Can it manage both tool dispensing and locker storage?
A4: Yes. CNC tool dispensing channels and smart locker compartments can work together in one system for mixed-material management.

Q5: Can the cabinet combination be customized?
A5: Yes. Cabinet quantity, locker size, channel layout, color and software workflow can be customized according to different factory requirements.

products.title_en: Smart Drawer Tool Cabinet for Measuring Tools, Gauges and Reusable Assets
products.description_en:
This Smart Drawer Tool Cabinet is designed for factories, tool rooms and inspection areas that need to manage measuring tools, gauges, reusable tools and high-value assets. Each drawer can be divided into multiple compartments for fixed-location storage, making it easier to issue, return and track tools.

It is suitable for calipers, micrometers, plug gauges, ring gauges, thread gauges, fixtures, jigs, tool holders, molds, hand tools and other reusable industrial assets. The system helps reduce tool loss, improve return management and keep clear usage records by employee, department, machine or project.
products.features_en:
• Smart drawer cabinet for measuring tools, gauges and reusable tool management
• Suitable for calipers, micrometers, plug gauges, ring gauges, thread gauges, fixtures and jigs
• Drawer compartments support fixed-location storage and return tracking
• Capacity can be customized, with up to 324 compartments depending on drawer layout
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Records tool issue, return, user, time, department and project information
• Helps reduce tool loss, missing gauges and unreturned reusable assets
• Supports overdue reminders, inventory reports and tool usage analysis
• Drawer size, compartment layout and cabinet color can be customized

System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized

products.faq_en:
Q1: What items can this smart drawer tool cabinet manage?
A1: It can manage calipers, micrometers, plug gauges, ring gauges, thread gauges, fixtures, jigs, molds, hand tools and other reusable tools.

Q2: Is this cabinet suitable for measuring tool management?
A2: Yes. The drawer and compartment structure is very suitable for gauges, measuring tools and inspection tools that need fixed-location storage.

Q3: Can the cabinet track tool return?
A3: Yes. The system can record tool issuing and return status, helping reduce missing tools and unreturned assets.

Q4: Can the drawer compartments be customized?
A4: Yes. Drawer quantity, compartment size and internal layout can be customized according to the size and type of tools.

Q5: Can it manage tools by employee or department?
A5: Yes. Usage records can be tracked by employee, department, machine, project or cost center depending on the software setup.

products.title_en: Weight-based vending cabinet for fasteners screws nuts and industrial consumables
products.description_en:
This Weight-Based Smart Vending Cabinet is designed for managing bulk industrial consumables that are difficult to count one by one. Employees can open the cabinet door, take the required materials and close the door. The system calculates inventory changes through built-in weighing sensors and records the pickup automatically.

It is suitable for screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings, terminals, cable ties, small spare parts, electrical parts and other MRO consumables. The cabinet helps factories reduce manual counting, improve inventory accuracy and control daily consumption in workshops, maintenance rooms and production lines.
products.features_en:
• Weight-based smart cabinet for bulk consumables and small parts
• Suitable for screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings and MRO supplies
• Employees open the door, take items and close the door for automatic settlement
• Built-in weighing sensors detect inventory changes after each pickup
• Reduces manual counting for fasteners and high-frequency consumables
• Supports controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Records user, item, pickup time, weight change and inventory balance
• Low-stock alerts help improve replenishment planning
• Shelf layout, bin size and cabinet structure can be customized
• Suitable for factories, workshops, maintenance rooms and MRO warehouses
products.specs_en:
Model:QT-G34
Product Type: Weight-Based Smart Vending Cabinet / Smart Weighing Cabinet
Storage Type: Shelf storage with weighing sensor system
Management Method: Open door, take items, close door and automatic weight-based calculation
Managed Items: Screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings, terminals, cable ties, small spare parts, electrical parts and MRO consumables
Access Methods: Employee card, PIN code, QR code, face recognition / Customizable
Sensor System: Built-in weighing sensors for inventory change detection
Software Functions: User management, item management, pickup records, weight-based inventory tracking, low-stock alerts, report export and consumption analysis
Customization: Shelf quantity, bin size, cabinet dimensions, color, managed item categories and software workflow can be customized
Application: Manufacturing plants, assembly lines, maintenance rooms, MRO warehouses, tool rooms and production workshops
System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What is a weight-based vending cabinet?
A1: It is a smart cabinet that uses weighing sensors to calculate inventory changes after employees take materials from the cabinet.

Q2: What items are suitable for this cabinet?
A2: It is suitable for screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings, terminals, cable ties, small spare parts and other bulk consumables.

Q3: How does the cabinet record material pickup?
A3: Employees log in, open the door, take items and close the door. The system detects the weight change and records the pickup automatically.

Q4: Is it better than counting small parts one by one?
A4: Yes. For bulk fasteners and consumables, weight-based management is more efficient than manual counting or single-item dispensing.

Q5: Can low-stock alerts be set for each material?
A5: Yes. Minimum stock levels can be set for each item, and the system can remind users when replenishment is needed.

products.title_en: Automated Micro Warehouse Cabinet for Printing Wheels, Tools and Reusable Parts
products.description_en:
This Automated Micro Warehouse Cabinet is designed for managing non-consumable, returnable and standard-shaped industrial items. It is especially suitable for materials that look very similar but must not be picked incorrectly, such as printing wheels, coding wheels, fixtures, jigs, molds, gauges, tool holders and other reusable production parts.

Employees can log in, select the required item and collect it from the pickup window. After use, the item can be returned to the cabinet, and the internal robotic handling system automatically places it back into its assigned storage position. This helps factories reduce wrong picking, improve return management and keep reusable tools and standard parts traceable.
products.features_en:
• Automated storage cabinet for non-consumable and returnable industrial items
• Suitable for printing wheels, coding wheels, fixtures, jigs, molds, gauges and standard parts
• Internal robotic handling system automatically retrieves and returns items
• Helps prevent wrong picking for items with similar appearance or close specifications
• Supports item pickup, return tracking and fixed-position storage
• Each item can be assigned to a specific storage location inside the cabinet
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Records user, item, pickup time, return time and storage position
• Suitable for high-value reusable parts and production changeover tools
• Cabinet structure, storage capacity and item tray layout can be customized
products.specs_en:
Product Type: Automated Micro Warehouse Cabinet / Automated Storage Cabinet
Storage Type: Internal automated storage with robotic handling system
Management Mode: Item pickup, item return, fixed-position storage and return tracking
Managed Items: Printing wheels, coding wheels, fixtures, jigs, molds, gauges, tool holders, standard parts, reusable tools and production changeover parts
Item Type: Non-consumable, returnable and regular-shaped items
Access Methods: Employee card, PIN code, QR code, face recognition / Customizable
Pickup Method: Employee selects item on screen and collects it from pickup window
Return Method: Employee returns item through the return area, and the system places it back to the assigned internal position
Software Functions: User permission management, item location management, pickup records, return records, overdue reminders, inventory status and report export
Customization: Cabinet size, storage capacity, tray layout, item identification method and software workflow can be customized
Application: Printing factories, packaging plants, manufacturing workshops, tool rooms, mold shops and production changeover areas
System Integration: ERP, MES, SAP and other inventory systems can be customized
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What items are suitable for this automated storage cabinet?
A1: It is suitable for non-consumable and returnable items such as printing wheels, coding wheels, fixtures, jigs, molds, gauges, tool holders and standard production parts.

Q2: Why is it suitable for printing wheels?
A2: Printing wheels often look similar but have different specifications. The automated storage system helps employees pick the correct item and return it to the assigned position.

Q3: How does the return process work?
A3: After use, the employee returns the item to the cabinet. The internal robotic handling system places it back into its assigned storage position.

Q4: Is this cabinet used for consumables like screws and nuts?
A4: It is more suitable for reusable and returnable items. For bulk consumables such as screws, nuts and washers, a weight-based vending cabinet is usually more suitable.

Q5: Can the storage positions be customized?
A5: Yes. The internal tray layout, storage capacity and item position settings can be customized according to item size, shape and management process.

products.title_en: RFID Smart Cabinet for Document Tracking, Asset Management and File Storage
products.description_en:
This RFID Smart Cabinet is designed for companies that need automatic identification and traceable management of documents, files, archives, reusable assets and high-value items. Each managed item can be attached with an RFID tag, allowing the cabinet system to identify stored items and update inventory status more efficiently.

It is suitable for file rooms, archives, offices, laboratories, tool rooms and asset management areas. The system supports controlled access, borrowing records, return tracking, automatic inventory checking and report export, helping users reduce manual searching, missing records and unreturned items.
products.features_en:
• RFID smart cabinet for document tracking, file storage and asset management
• Suitable for documents, archives, contracts, drawings, reusable items and high-value assets
• RFID tag identification helps improve item recognition and inventory checking
• Supports borrowing records, return tracking and item status management
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Automatic inventory checking reduces manual counting and searching
• Helps reduce missing files, unreturned documents and misplaced assets
• User permission management for different departments or item categories
• Reports can be exported for audit, archive management and asset control
• Cabinet size, compartment layout and RFID workflow can be customized
products.specs_en:
Product Type: RFID Smart Cabinet 
Storage Type: Multi-compartment cabinet with RFID identification
Management Mode: RFID item identification, borrowing, return tracking and inventory checking
Managed Items: Documents, files, archives, contracts, drawings, reusable assets, high-value items and controlled materials
Identification Method: RFID tag identification / Customizable
Access Methods: Employee card, PIN code, QR code, face recognition / Customizable
Software Functions: User permission management, item registration, RFID inventory checking, borrowing records, return records, item status tracking, overdue reminders and report export
Customization: Cabinet size, compartment quantity, door layout, RFID tag type and software workflow can be customized
Application: File rooms, archives, offices, laboratories, tool rooms, asset management rooms and government or enterprise storage areas
System Integration: ERP, OA, asset management systems and other platforms can be customized
Package: Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What items can this RFID smart cabinet manage?
A1: It can manage documents, files, archives, contracts, drawings, reusable assets, high-value items and other controlled materials.

Q2: How does RFID help with document or asset management?
A2: Each item can be attached with an RFID tag. The cabinet can identify tagged items and update inventory status more efficiently than manual checking.

Q3: Can the cabinet track document borrowing and return?
A3: Yes. The system can record who borrowed the file or asset, when it was taken, when it was returned and whether it is overdue.

Q4: Is this only for file storage?
A4: No. It can also be used for reusable assets, tools, samples, equipment parts and other items that need RFID tracking.

Q5: Can the RFID cabinet be customized?
A5: Yes. Cabinet size, compartment quantity, RFID tag type, door layout and software workflow can be customized according to the application.

products.title_en: CNC Tool Vending Machine for Cutting Tools, Inserts, End Mills and Taps
products.description_en: CNC Tool Management is designed for machining workshops, tool rooms and manufacturing plants that use many cutting tools every day. Smart cabinets help manage end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools and tool holders with controlled access, usage records and inventory alerts.
products.features_en:
• Controls cutting tool issuing at the point of use
• Tracks end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts and tool holders by user or machine
• Reduces unrecorded tool pickup and tool waste
• Supports used tool return, tool replenishment and stock alerts
• Helps analyze CNC tool cost by department, machine or job
products.specs_en:
Model DL60A
MOQ 1pc
Overall Dimensions 1600*720*600 mm
capacity 6x10 slots
Networking options  Ethernet, 4G, Wi-Fi
Item Categories Consumables CNC inserts, end mills, drills, taps, etc
 Power consumption 100-200W
Package Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What CNC tools can be managed in this smart cabinet?
A1: It can manage common CNC cutting tools such as end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, tool holders and gauges. The storage layout can be adjusted according to tool size and tool usage frequency.

Q2: Can the system track tool usage by employee or machine?
A2: Yes. Each pickup can be recorded by employee, item, quantity, time, machine, department or cost center. This helps machine shops analyze tool consumption and reduce unrecorded tool collection.

Q3: Can the cabinet remind us when cutting tools are low in stock?
A3: Yes. Minimum stock levels can be set for each tool. When the stock of end mills, inserts, drills or taps reaches the warning level, the system can send a low-stock reminder for timely replenishment.

Q4: Is it suitable for tool rooms and CNC production lines?
A4: Yes. The cabinet can be placed in a central tool room or near CNC machining centers. Operators can collect approved tools at the point of use, which reduces waiting time and improves production efficiency.

Q5: Can used tools or regrinding tools be returned through the system?
A5: Yes. Depending on the cabinet configuration, used tool return can be managed through return lockers or assigned return compartments. This is useful for tool regrinding, cost tracking and tool life management.

Q6: Can the system help control CNC tool cost?
A6: Yes. Usage data can be exported by employee, machine, department or cost center, which helps managers analyze cutting tool cost and identify abnormal consumption.

Q7: Can different tools have different pickup permissions?
A7: Yes. Permission rules can be configured by tool category, employee role, department or machining area. This helps control access to high-value tools such as carbide inserts and special tool holders.

Q8: Can the cabinet manage both standard and non-standard CNC tools?
A8: Yes. Standard tools can be stored in dispensing channels, while larger or special tools can be managed in lockers, drawers or auxiliary cabinets.

Q9: Can it support multiple CNC machines or production lines?
A9: Yes. A cabinet can serve one workshop area, and multiple cabinets can be deployed across different CNC lines or tool rooms. Usage data can be managed by site or department.

Q10: Can the cabinet reduce waiting time at the tool room?
A10: Yes. Operators can collect approved cutting tools directly from the cabinet, which reduces manual issuing work and avoids waiting when the tool room is busy or closed.

products.title_en: PPE Vending Machine for Industrial Safety Supplies and Employee Distribution
products.description_en: PPE & Safety Supplies Management helps factories control daily distribution of safety items such as gloves, masks, safety glasses, earplugs and protective equipment. A PPE vending cabinet allows employees to collect approved items by themselves while the system records each pickup and inventory change.
products.features_en:
• Controls PPE pickup by employee, department or item category
• Supports collection limits to reduce overuse of safety supplies
• Tracks gloves, masks, safety glasses, earplugs and protective items
• Improves availability of PPE near production lines and workshops
• Provides usage reports for safety, warehouse and purchasing teams
products.specs_en:
Main Application: PPE management and safety supplies control
Managed Items :Safety gloves, masks, goggles, respirators, helmets, earplugs, protective clothing, and safety shoes
Suitable Locations Safety gloves, masks, goggles, respirators, helmets, earplugs, protective clothing, and safety shoes
Core Functions: User access control, issue records, usage limits, stock alerts, and replenishment reminders

Company service

Company service

About Us: Our company is a professional manufacturer of smart material cabinets and industrial vending systems, focusing on MRO inventory management solutions. We help customers manage tools, spare parts, PPE, consumables, office supplies, and other materials more efficiently.
