products.faq_en:
Q1: What PPE items can be managed in the vending cabinet?
A1: The cabinet can manage work gloves, safety glasses, masks, earplugs, respirators, protective sleeves, helmets, reflective vests, shoe covers and other safety supplies used in factories and workshops.

Q2: Can employees collect PPE by ID card, PIN or face recognition?
A2: Yes. Access methods can include employee card, PIN code, QR code, account login or face recognition. The factory can choose the method that best matches its employee management process.

Q3: Can the system limit how many PPE items each employee can take?
A3: Yes. Pickup limits can be set by employee, department, item type or time period. This helps reduce over-collection of gloves, masks and other high-frequency safety supplies.

Q4: Can the PPE vending cabinet help safety managers track consumption?
A4: Yes. The system records who collected each item, when it was collected and which department it belongs to. Reports can support safety management, purchasing and cost analysis.

Q5: Is the cabinet suitable for different PPE package sizes?
A5: Yes. Locker size, compartment layout and dispensing method can be customized for small items such as earplugs and larger items such as helmets, face shields or PPE kits.

Q6: Can PPE issuing rules be different for each department?
A6: Yes. For example, welding, machining, assembly and warehouse departments can have different PPE lists and pickup limits according to safety requirements.

Q7: Can the cabinet support emergency PPE access?
A7: Yes. Emergency access rules can be configured depending on site policy. Critical safety items can also be placed in easy-access compartments.

Q8: Can managers see which PPE items are used most often?
A8: Yes. The system can generate item usage reports to show consumption trends for gloves, masks, safety glasses and other PPE supplies.

Q9: Can the cabinet help reduce PPE waste?
A9: Yes. Controlled pickup, collection limits and user records make employees more accountable and help reduce unnecessary collection of gloves and other consumables.

Q10: Can PPE items with different package sizes be stored together?
A10: Yes. Small items such as earplugs and larger items such as helmets or face shields can be stored in different lockers or customized compartments.

products.title_en: Fastener Vending Cabinet for Screws, Nuts, Bolts and MRO Consumables
products.description_en: Fasteners & Consumables Management is suitable for factories that use large quantities of screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings and other small MRO consumables. Smart weighing cabinets and locker cabinets help reduce manual counting and improve inventory accuracy for high-frequency items.
products.features_en:
• Manages bulk fasteners and small consumables efficiently
• Suitable for screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets and fittings
• Weight-based inventory calculation reduces manual counting
• Records pickup by user, item, time and department
• Low-stock alerts support timely replenishment for production lines
products.specs_en:
Item Description
Product Category Fasteners & Consumables Management
Product Type Smart weighing cabinet / industrial consumables vending cabinet
Main Application Line-side storage, assembly workshop, maintenance room, MRO supply area
Managed Items Screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, clips, terminals, fittings, cable ties, O-rings, seals, gaskets, small spare parts
Inventory Method Weight-based sensing, compartment storage, or customized material tracking
Access Method Employee card, PIN, face recognition, QR code, or account login
Main Functions Controlled access, automatic usage records, low-stock alerts, replenishment reminders, report export
Data Records User, item, time, department, machine number, quantity or weight change, collection reason
Software Support Inventory report, consumption analysis, user permission, stock warning, ERP/MES/SAP integration
Custom Options Cabinet size, shelf layout, weighing module, compartment quantity, color, logo, language, software workflow
Suitable Industries CNC machining, automotive parts, electronics, metal fabrication, mold manufacturing, equipment maintenance
products.faq_en:
Q1: Is weight-based management suitable for screws and nuts?
A1: Yes. For bulk fasteners such as screws, nuts, bolts and washers, weight-based inventory is often more efficient than counting each piece manually. The system calculates stock changes based on weight difference.

Q2: What consumables can be stored in this type of cabinet?
A2: It can manage screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, fittings, terminals, cable ties, electrical parts, small spare parts and other high-frequency MRO consumables.

Q3: How does the cabinet record pickup for small parts?
A3: Employees log in, open the cabinet or compartment, take the required materials and close the door. The system detects inventory change and records the pickup information automatically.

Q4: Can different bins or shelves manage different fasteners?
A4: Yes. Each bin, shelf or compartment can be assigned to a different SKU. The layout can be customized according to item size, packaging method and daily consumption volume.

Q5: Can low-stock alerts be set for fasteners and consumables?
A5: Yes. Minimum stock levels can be set for each item. When screws, nuts, bolts or other consumables are below the set level, the system can remind the warehouse or purchasing team to replenish.

Q6: Can the cabinet manage open-bin fasteners?
A6: Yes. Open-bin or shelf storage can be combined with weighing sensors or controlled access depending on the management method required.

Q7: Can it manage fasteners by SKU?
A7: Yes. Each SKU can be assigned to a bin, shelf, locker or weighing position. The system records item name, SKU, stock level and pickup history.

Q8: Can the cabinet reduce stock errors for small parts?
A8: Yes. Weight-based calculation and automatic pickup records reduce the need for manual counting and help keep inventory more accurate.

Q9: Is it suitable for high-volume production consumables?
A9: Yes. It is suitable for high-frequency consumables used in assembly lines, maintenance rooms, metal fabrication workshops and MRO storage areas.

Q10: Can replenishment be managed by minimum stock level?
A10: Yes. Minimum stock and warning stock levels can be set for each consumable item, helping purchasing or warehouse teams replenish before shortages happen.

products.title_en: Smart File Cabinet for Document Management, Archive Storage and File Tracking
products.description_en: Documents & Archives Management is designed for offices, factories, archives and departments that need controlled borrowing and return of files, drawings, contracts and paper records. Smart file cabinets help reduce missing files and make document access traceable.
products.features_en:
• Controls access to files, drawings, contracts and archives
• Records file borrowing, return time and user information
• Helps reduce missing documents and unreturned files
• Supports fixed drawer or compartment location management
• Suitable for offices, factories, archives and enterprise document rooms
products.specs_en:
Item Description
Product Category Documents & Archives Management
Product Type Smart file cabinet / smart document cabinet / archive locker
Main Application Document room, archive room, engineering office, quality department, factory file center
Managed Items Engineering drawings, contracts, manuals, inspection records, quality documents, batch records, project files, confidential files
Access Method Employee card, PIN, face recognition, QR code, account login or customized access method
File Identification File number, drawer number, compartment number, barcode, QR code or customized document code
Main Functions File borrowing, file return, access control, return tracking, overdue reminder, record export
Data Records User, file name, file number, drawer/compartment number, borrowing time, return time, department, document status
Cabinet Structure Multi-drawer file cabinet, smart archive cabinet, modular expansion file locker
Software Support Document database, permission management, borrowing records, file search, report export
Custom Options Cabinet size, drawer quantity, compartment size, color, logo, software language, document workflow
Suitable Industries Manufacturing, engineering, automotive, electronics, aerospace, laboratory, quality management, office archive management
products.faq_en:
Q1: Can the smart file cabinet record file borrowing and return?
A1: Yes. The system can record who borrowed a file, when it was taken, when it was returned and whether the file is overdue. This helps reduce missing documents and unclear responsibility.

Q2: What documents can be managed in this cabinet?
A2: It can manage contracts, drawings, certificates, project files, technical records, archives, paper folders and other documents that need controlled borrowing and storage.

Q3: Is RFID required for document management?
A3: Not always. A standard smart file cabinet can manage files by drawer number, file code, barcode or manual selection. RFID can be added when automatic item identification is required.

Q4: Can different departments have different access permissions?
A4: Yes. Access permissions can be set by employee, department, file category or document level. This is useful for finance, engineering, quality, HR and archive departments.

Q5: Can the cabinet help find files faster?
A5: Yes. Files can be assigned to fixed drawers or compartments, and the system can show storage location and borrowing status. This reduces manual searching in file rooms.

Q6: Can the cabinet manage confidential documents?
A6: Yes. User permissions can be set for confidential files, contracts and controlled records so that only authorized employees can access them.

Q7: Can overdue file returns be reminded?
A7: Yes. The system can record expected return time and generate overdue reminders when files, drawings or archives are not returned on time.

Q8: Can files be searched by name or code?
A8: Yes. Files can be registered by name, file number, project code, drawing number or other identifiers to make searching and locating easier.

Q9: Can the cabinet manage engineering drawings?
A9: Yes. Engineering drawings, technical documents and project files can be stored in assigned drawers or compartments with borrowing records.

Q10: Can the cabinet be used in government or enterprise archives?
A10: Yes. It is suitable for enterprises, archives, government offices, factories and departments that need controlled document borrowing and return records.

products.title_en: Smart Locker System for Employee Lockers, Offices and Workplace Storage
products.description_en: Employee Personal Storage helps factories, offices, schools and corporate buildings provide secure storage for staff belongings, uniforms, bags, shoes and personal items. Smart lockers improve convenience while reducing manual key management.
products.features_en:
• Provides secure personal storage for employees and visitors
• Supports PIN code, employee card, QR code or face recognition access
• Reduces manual key management and locker assignment workload
• Locker size, quantity and color can be customized
• Suitable for factories, offices, gyms, schools and staff areas
products.specs_en:
Model QTL64
Product Type Smart Employee Locker Cabinet
Locker Quantity 64 independent lockers
Door Type Opaque steel doors / solid metal doors
Main Application Employee personal storage, staff lockers, workplace item storage
Managed Items Personal belongings, bags, uniforms, workwear, documents, mobile phones, keys, small tools
Access Methods IC card, PIN code, face recognition, QR code, fingerprint optional
Control System Central touchscreen control system
Screen Size 10-inch / 15-inch touch screen optional
Cabinet Material Cold-rolled steel with powder coating
Cabinet Color White, grey, blue or customized color
Locker Size Customizable according to item size
Overall Dimensions Custom size available based on 64-door layout
Power Supply AC 110V / 220V, 50/60Hz
Network WiFi, Ethernet, 4G optional
Software Functions User management, access records, locker status monitoring, remote management
Data Records Automatic storage and pickup records by user, time and locker number
Installation Indoor floor-standing installation
Suitable Locations Factories, offices, schools, gyms, hospitals, workshops, warehouses
Customization Locker quantity, cabinet size, door size, color, access method and software integration can be customized
products.faq_en:
Q1: Can employees open lockers without physical keys?
A1: Yes. Smart lockers can support PIN code, employee card, QR code, face recognition or account login, reducing the need for manual keys and key replacement.

Q2: What can employees store in the locker?
A2: Employees can store bags, uniforms, shoes, helmets, laptops, personal belongings, visitor items and other daily workplace items depending on locker size.

Q3: Can locker size and quantity be customized?
A3: Yes. Locker quantity, door size, cabinet color, screen position and access method can be customized for factories, offices, gyms, schools or staff areas.

Q4: Can one locker be assigned to one employee?
A4: Yes. The system can support fixed locker assignment or temporary locker use, depending on the workplace management process.

Q5: Is it suitable for both offices and factories?
A5: Yes. It can be used in office buildings, factories, staff changing rooms, visitor areas, schools, gyms and other places that need organized personal storage.

Q6: Can the locker be used for temporary visitors?
A6: Yes. It can support temporary locker assignment for visitors, contractors or short-term users, depending on the software configuration.

Q7: Can the system show locker occupancy?
A7: Yes. Managers can view which lockers are occupied, available or assigned, making it easier to manage staff storage areas.

Q8: Can lockers be opened remotely by an administrator?
A8: Remote opening can be configured for authorized administrators, depending on the site security policy and software setup.

Q9: Can it be used in staff changing rooms?
A9: Yes. Employee smart lockers are suitable for staff changing rooms, factory entrances, office areas, gyms, schools and dormitory areas.

Q10: Can locker records be exported?
A10: Yes. Locker use records can be exported for administration, security review or facility management.

products.title_en: Tool Tracking System for Reusable Tools, Gauges, Fixtures and Asset Control
products.description_en: Reusable Tools & Assets Management is for non-consumable items that need to be issued, used and returned. Smart drawer cabinets and automated storage cabinets help manage gauges, fixtures, molds, tool holders, shared tools and high-value assets with clear responsibility records.
products.features_en:
• Tracks reusable tools from checkout to return
• Suitable for gauges, fixtures, molds, jigs, tool holders and shared tools
• Helps reduce missing tools and unreturned assets
• Supports fixed-location storage and overdue reminders
• Records usage by employee, department, project or cost center
products.specs_en:
Model DR128
Storage Method Multiple independent drawers for classified material storage
Suitable Locations Tool rooms, CNC workshops, maintenance departments, laboratories, warehouses, production lines, and MRO inventory centers
capacity 128 compartments
System Integration Approx. 300kg
Item Categories Consumables Optional integration with ERP, MES, SAP, WMS, and other enterprise management systems
Power consumption 200-380W
Package Wooden box
products.faq_en:
Q1: What reusable tools and assets can be managed?
A1: The cabinet can manage calipers, micrometers, gauges, fixtures, jigs, molds, tool holders, shared tools, printing wheels and other returnable or high-value industrial assets.

Q2: Can the system track whether a tool has been returned?
A2: Yes. The system records tool checkout and return status. Managers can see which tools are in the cabinet, which tools are in use and which tools are overdue.

Q3: Can each tool have a fixed storage position?
A3: Yes. Drawer compartments, lockers or internal storage positions can be assigned to specific tools. This helps users return items to the correct location and reduces wrong placement.

Q4: Is this different from consumable inventory management?
A4: Yes. Reusable tool management focuses on checkout, return and responsibility tracking. Consumable management focuses more on stock reduction and replenishment after use.

Q5: Can the cabinet reduce tool loss?
A5: Yes. Because every pickup and return is recorded by user and time, employees become more accountable and managers can identify missing or overdue tools more quickly.

Q6: Can the cabinet manage calibration tools?
A6: Yes. Calibration tools, measuring tools and inspection gauges can be stored in assigned compartments with checkout and return records.

Q7: Can the system remind users to return tools?
A7: Yes. Overdue reminders can be configured so managers can follow up on tools that have not been returned within the expected time.

Q8: Can it manage high-value shared assets?
A8: Yes. High-value tools, fixtures, handheld devices, test equipment and reusable production assets can be managed with controlled access and usage records.

Q9: Can tool condition be recorded after return?
A9: A return workflow can be customized to include condition check, maintenance status or user remarks when the item is returned.

Q10: Which cabinet type is best for reusable assets?
A10: Smart drawer cabinets are suitable for gauges and small tools, RFID cabinets are suitable for tagged assets, and automated storage cabinets are suitable for standard-shaped returnable items.

products.title_en: Office Supply Vending Machine for Stationery, IT Supplies and Workplace Consumables
products.description_en: Office Supplies Management helps companies control daily use of stationery, IT accessories and workplace consumables. Smart office supply cabinets allow employees to collect approved items by themselves while managers track consumption by department or cost center.
products.features_en:
• Manages stationery, toner, labels, cables and IT accessories
• Provides self-service pickup for employees and departments
• Reduces office administration and manual supply distribution
• Tracks office supply consumption by user or cost center
• Supports customizable lockers for different item sizes
products.specs_en:
Product Category Office Supplies Management
Product Type Office supply vending machine / smart office supply cabinet / self-service supply locker
Main Application Office supply room, administration office, coworking space, school, corporate workplace, IT department
Managed Items Stationery, pens, notebooks, labels, paper, toner, ink cartridges, cables, adapters, USB drives, keyboards, mice, small office tools
Access Method Employee card, PIN, QR code, face recognition, account login or customized access method
Main Functions Self-service pickup, access control, automatic records, inventory tracking, low-stock alerts, report export
Data Records User, item name, quantity, pickup time, department, cost center, stock level
Cabinet Structure Multi-compartment locker, drawer cabinet, grid cabinet, mixed-size compartment cabinet
Software Support Item database, user permission, department usage report, inventory warning, replenishment list
Custom Options Cabinet size, compartment quantity, drawer size, color, logo, screen size, software language
Suitable Users Offices, schools, coworking spaces, factories, banks, hospitals, government offices, IT departments
products.faq_en:
Q1: What office supplies can be stored in the vending cabinet?
A1: It can store pens, notebooks, sticky notes, paper, labels, toner, ink cartridges, USB drives, cables, chargers, adapters, keyboards, mice, batteries and other workplace supplies.

Q2: Can office supply usage be tracked by department?
A2: Yes. The system can record pickup by employee, department or cost center. This helps companies understand which departments use more stationery, toner or IT accessories.

Q3: Can IT accessories and stationery be managed together?
A3: Yes. Different locker sizes or compartments can be used for small stationery and larger IT accessories such as keyboards, mice, adapters and chargers.

Q4: Can the cabinet reduce office administration work?
A4: Yes. Employees can collect approved items by themselves, while the system records the pickup automatically. This reduces manual distribution by administrative staff.

Q5: Can pickup limits be set for office consumables?
A5: Yes. Collection limits can be set by employee, department, item type or time period to control unnecessary use of office supplies.

Q6: Can the cabinet manage toner and ink cartridges?
A6: Yes. Toner, ink cartridges, labels, paper, printer accessories and other office consumables can be stored and issued through the cabinet.

Q7: Can managers set approval rules for expensive supplies?
A7: Yes. Higher-value items such as toner, keyboards, adapters or IT accessories can require permission or approval before pickup.

Q8: Can the cabinet support multiple office floors?
A8: Yes. Cabinets can be placed on different floors or office areas, and usage data can be managed by location or department.

Q9: Can employees search items on the screen?
A9: Yes. The software interface can list available items by name, category or code, helping employees find the correct supplies faster.

Q10: Can it help with monthly office supply cost analysis?
A10: Yes. Reports can show item consumption by department, employee or cost center, making monthly office supply cost analysis easier.

products.title_en: Smart Food Pickup Locker for Takeout, Meal Collection and Office Buildings
products.description_en: Food Pickup and Meal Collection lockers help office buildings, cafeterias, schools and delivery points organize takeout and meal pickup. Heated, refrigerated and ambient compartments can be customized for different food storage needs.
products.features_en: Food Pickup and Meal Collection lockers help office buildings, cafeterias, schools and delivery points organize takeout and meal pickup. Heated, refrigerated and ambient compartments can be customized for different food storage needs.
products.specs_en:
Item Description

Product Category Food Pickup and Meal Collection
Product Type Smart food pickup locker / meal pickup locker / takeout locker
Main Application Office buildings, corporate campuses, canteens, schools, hospitals, apartments, food delivery pickup points
Stored Items Takeout meals, lunch boxes, employee meals, drinks, snacks, restaurant orders, pre-ordered food
Storage Options Ambient, heated, refrigerated, or mixed-temperature compartments
Pickup Method QR code, pickup code, employee card, PIN, touchscreen operation or customized access method
Main Functions Order storage, compartment assignment, self-service pickup, pickup record, timeout reminder
Cabinet Structure Multi-compartment locker, master control screen, small and large compartment combination
Software Support Order management, user record, pickup status, compartment status, backend management
Custom Options Heating function, cooling function, compartment size, door quantity, cabinet color, logo, software language
Suitable Users Office buildings, food delivery operators, property management companies, canteens, restaurants, campuses
products.faq_en:
Q1: Can the food pickup locker provide heating or cooling?
A1: Yes. The locker can be customized with heated, refrigerated or ambient compartments according to the food type and application scenario.

Q2: How do users collect their meals?
A2: Users can collect meals by QR code, pickup code, employee card, PIN or other configured access methods. The system can guide users to the correct compartment.

Q3: Is it suitable for office buildings?
A3: Yes. It is suitable for office lobbies, cafeterias, corporate campuses, schools, hospitals and smart building food delivery areas.

Q4: What food items can be stored?
A4: It can store takeout meals, lunch boxes, drinks, snacks, cold food, hot meals, restaurant orders, cafeteria orders and packaged food.

Q5: Can different compartment sizes be combined?
A5: Yes. Small, medium and large compartments can be combined to fit drinks, lunch boxes and larger meal packages.

Q6: Can the food locker be connected with ordering systems?
A6: System integration can be customized depending on the ordering platform, pickup code method and project requirements.

Q7: Can pickup codes prevent wrong meal collection?
A7: Yes. Each order can be linked to a pickup code or QR code, so users only open the assigned compartment for their meal.

Q8: Can hot and cold food be stored in the same cabinet?
A8: Yes. Mixed-temperature cabinet designs can combine heated, refrigerated and ambient compartments in one locker system.

Q9: Can the locker be branded for restaurants or office buildings?
A9: Yes. Cabinet color, signage, interface, logo area and door layout can be customized for corporate buildings, cafeterias or food service brands.

Q10: Can the system record whether a meal has been collected?
A10: Yes. Pickup status can be recorded, including order number, compartment, pickup time and collection result depending on software configuration.

products.title_en: Refrigerated Chemical Storage Cabinet for Lab Reagents, Liquid Bottles and Samples
products.description_en: Chemical Liquid Management is for laboratories, testing centers and factories that need controlled storage for reagents, liquid bottles, samples and temperature-sensitive materials. Refrigerated smart cabinets help control access, record usage and improve chemical inventory visibility.
products.features_en:
• Designed for refrigerated or temperature-controlled chemical bottle storage
• Suitable for reagents, liquid bottles, samples and lab materials
• Controls access by user, department or project
• Records pickup, return, bottle status and inventory changes
• Safety options can be discussed based on chemical properties
products.specs_en:
Product Category Chemical Liquid Bottle Management
Product Type Smart refrigerated chemical storage cabinet / temperature-controlled chemical cabinet
Main Application Laboratory, chemical room, testing center, R&D department, factory material room
Stored Items Chemical liquid bottles, reagents, testing solutions, samples, additives, laboratory liquids
Storage Mode Refrigerated storage, temperature-controlled storage, or customized cooling range
Access Method Employee card, PIN, QR code, face recognition, account login or customized method
Main Functions Controlled access, bottle pickup record, inventory tracking, temperature monitoring, low-stock alert
Data Records User, bottle name, item code, pickup time, department, quantity, storage location, inventory status
Cabinet Structure Multi-layer shelves, transparent doors, refrigerated compartment, smart touchscreen control
Software Support Item database, user permission, inventory report, temperature record, replenishment reminder
Custom Options Cooling temperature range, shelf layout, bottle capacity, cabinet size, color, logo, software language
Safety Options Lock control, access permission, leakage tray, alarm reminder, optional ventilation design
Suitable Users Laboratories, chemical manufacturers, medical labs, universities, R&D centers, quality testing rooms
products.faq_en:
Q1: Can the cabinet store chemical liquid bottles and reagents?
A1: Yes. It can be configured for reagent bottles, lab samples, testing solutions, additives and other liquid bottle materials that need controlled access and organized storage.

Q2: Is refrigerated or temperature-controlled storage available?
A2: Yes. Cooling or temperature-controlled storage can be customized according to the storage requirements of the material. The required temperature range should be confirmed before production.

Q3: Can it store flammable or corrosive liquids?
A3: It depends on the chemical properties and safety requirements. Flammable, corrosive or hazardous liquids need to be confirmed before selecting cabinet structure, ventilation and safety options.

Q4: Can bottle access be recorded?
A4: Yes. The system can record user, time, item name, bottle status and inventory changes, helping laboratories or factories improve chemical inventory traceability.

Q5: Can safety accessories be added?
A5: Options such as leakage trays, alarms, ventilation, permission control and custom shelves can be discussed according to the material type and application environment.

Q6: Can each bottle have an assigned storage position?
A6: Yes. Bottles can be assigned to fixed shelves, compartments or positions, helping users find and return chemical bottles more accurately.

Q7: Can access be limited by user role?
A7: Yes. Access permissions can be set by user, department, project or chemical category to improve safety and responsibility control.

Q8: Can the cabinet manage expiration dates?
A8: Expiration date management can be customized in the software so users can track reagent validity and reduce expired material use.

Q9: Can the system export chemical usage records?
A9: Yes. Usage records can be exported for laboratory management, safety review, purchasing analysis or internal inventory control.

Q10: What information should be confirmed before ordering?
A10: Bottle size, material type, storage temperature, safety requirements, ventilation needs and access workflow should be confirmed before cabinet design.

products.name_en: CNC Machining and Precision Parts Manufacturing
products.title_en: CNC Tool Vending Machine Solution for CNC Machining and Precision Parts
products.description_en: CNC machining and precision parts factories use a large number of cutting tools, measuring tools and MRO supplies every day. Smart cabinets help control tool issuing, record usage, reduce untracked pickup and keep critical tools available near machining centers.
products.features_en:
• Use CNC tool vending machines for controlled cutting tool dispensing
• Use smart drawer cabinets for gauges, calipers and measuring tools
• Track tool pickup by employee, machine, department or cost center
• Set low-stock alerts for high-frequency cutting tools
• Use auxiliary cabinets or modular vending systems for capacity expansion
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can be managed for CNC machining factories?
A1: The system can manage end mills, drills, taps, carbide inserts, reamers, boring tools, gauges, tool holders, PPE, fasteners and MRO supplies.

Q2: Can the cabinet track tool usage by CNC machine?
A2: Yes. Tool pickup can be recorded by employee, machine, department, job number or cost center depending on the software setup.

Q3: Can it help reduce cutting tool costs?
A3: Yes. Usage reports help managers analyze tool consumption, reduce unrecorded collection and identify abnormal use of inserts, drills or end mills.

Q4: Which cabinet is best for cutting tools?
A4: CNC tool vending machines are best for standard cutting tools, while drawer cabinets are better for gauges and reusable measuring tools.

Q5: Can used tools be returned through the system?
A5: Yes. Used tool return can be managed through return lockers or assigned compartments depending on the cabinet configuration.

Q6: Can it work for 24-hour CNC workshops?
A6: Yes. Authorized operators can collect approved tools at any time, reducing dependence on manual tool room issuing.

Q7: Can the system alert us before tools run out?
A7: Yes. Minimum stock levels can be set for each SKU, and low-stock reminders can support timely replenishment.

Q8: Can the cabinet connect with ERP or MES?
A8: ERP, MES, SAP or other inventory systems can be integrated according to project requirements.

Q9: Can the storage capacity be expanded later?
A9: Yes. Auxiliary cabinets and modular vending systems can be added as tool SKU quantity increases.

Q10: Is this suitable for precision parts manufacturers?
A10: Yes. It is especially suitable for precision parts factories that need strict tool control, cost tracking and production continuity.

products.title_en: Industrial Vending Machine Solution for Smart Factory Inventory Management
products.description_en: General manufacturing plants manage many material categories across production lines, warehouses and maintenance areas. Smart industrial vending cabinets provide controlled self-service access for tools, PPE, spare parts and consumables while keeping inventory data visible.
products.features_en:
• Reduce manual warehouse issuing work
• Improve material availability across production areas
• Support mixed-material management in one platform
• Provide data for smart factory and lean manufacturing
• Improve replenishment planning with stock alerts
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can a smart factory cabinet system manage?
A1: It can manage tools, PPE, spare parts, fasteners, office supplies, batteries, labels, maintenance kits and other MRO consumables.

Q2: Can one system manage multiple departments?
A2: Yes. Users, departments, item categories and cabinet locations can be managed through the software.

Q3: Can the cabinet reduce manual warehouse issuing?
A3: Yes. Employees can collect approved items by themselves, while the system automatically records each pickup.

Q4: Is it suitable for smart factory projects?
A4: Yes. The system supports digital inventory data, usage records, reports and optional ERP/MES integration.

Q5: Can different cabinet types be combined?
A5: Yes. Locker cabinets, drawer cabinets, weighing cabinets and vending machines can be combined for mixed material management.

Q6: Can low-stock alerts be set for each SKU?
A6: Yes. Minimum stock and warning stock levels can be set for each item.

Q7: Can it support multiple factory locations?
A7: Multiple cabinets can be deployed across different workshops, warehouses or plants depending on the software configuration.

Q8: Can pickup limits be set for consumables?
A8: Yes. Collection rules can be set by user, department, item category or time period.

Q9: Can reports be exported for purchasing?
A9: Yes. Pickup records and stock reports can support purchasing, warehouse management and cost analysis.

Q10: Can cabinet layout be customized?
A10: Yes. Locker sizes, drawer layout, weighing shelves and cabinet combinations can be customized according to material types.

products.name_en: Hardware, Metal Fabrication and Aluminum Processing
products.title_en: Industrial Vending Cabinet for Metal Fabrication Tools, Fasteners and PPE
products.description_en: Hardware, metal fabrication and aluminum processing workshops use many fasteners, abrasives, hand tools, cutting tools and PPE every day. Smart cabinets help organize line-side materials, reduce tool loss and keep consumables available for production.
products.features_en:
• Improve workshop material control for metal fabrication
• Reduce missing tools and uncontrolled consumable use
• Support fastener and small-parts inventory accuracy
• Improve PPE availability near production areas
• Track material usage by team or project
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials are common in metal fabrication workshops?
A1: Common items include screws, nuts, bolts, washers, rivets, grinding discs, cutting discs, drill bits, welding tips, hand tools and PPE.

Q2: Which cabinet is suitable for fasteners?
A2: A fastener vending machine or weight-based vending cabinet is suitable for screws, nuts, bolts, washers and other bulk small parts.

Q3: Can abrasive consumables be managed?
A3: Yes. Grinding discs, cutting discs and similar workshop consumables can be managed in lockers or compartments according to size and package type.

Q4: Can the system track usage by project?
A4: A project or work order field can be added to the pickup process when project-based cost tracking is needed.

Q5: Can the cabinet manage PPE for metal workshops?
A5: Yes. PPE such as gloves, safety glasses, masks, face shields and protective sleeves can be managed through a PPE vending cabinet.

Q6: Can it reduce tool loss?
A6: Yes. Controlled access and user records help reduce missing hand tools and unrecorded material collection.

Q7: Can locker sizes be customized?
A7: Yes. Locker sizes and compartment layouts can be customized for large tools, tool kits or packaged consumables.

Q8: Is the system suitable for aluminum processing plants?
A8: Yes. It can manage cutting tools, fasteners, abrasives, measuring tools and maintenance supplies used in aluminum processing.

Q9: Can low-stock alerts be set for workshop consumables?
A9: Yes. Each item can have a minimum stock level and replenishment reminder.

Q10: Can usage reports be exported?
A10: Yes. Reports can be exported for workshop management, purchasing and cost analysis.

products.name_en: Mold, Injection Molding and Precision Tooling
products.title_en: Smart Tool Cabinet Solution for Mold Shops, Injection Molding and Spare Parts
products.description_en: Mold making, injection molding and precision tooling factories manage mold repair tools, components, cutting tools and spare parts. Smart cabinets help technicians find the right item faster, reduce missing tools and support traceable mold maintenance material usage.
products.features_en:
• Improve mold maintenance material availability
• Reduce missing repair tools and small spare parts
• Support technician-level usage records
• Organize mixed-size mold tools and components
• Improve emergency repair response speed
products.faq_en:
Q1: What items can be managed in a mold shop?
A1: The system can manage mold repair tools, ejector pins, springs, screws, inserts, polishing tools, gauges, cutting tools and maintenance spare parts.

Q2: Can usage be linked to mold number?
A2: A mold number, machine number or work order field can be added to the pickup workflow when traceability is required.

Q3: Which cabinet is best for mold components?
A3: Small mold components can be managed in drawer cabinets, locker cabinets or fastener cabinets depending on size and quantity.

Q4: Can technicians collect parts during night shifts?
A4: Yes. Authorized technicians can collect approved items from the cabinet during different shifts while the system records each pickup.

Q5: Can the cabinet reduce missing mold tools?
A5: Yes. Controlled access and pickup records make tool responsibility clearer and reduce untracked borrowing.

Q6: Can emergency spare parts be stored in the cabinet?
A6: Yes. Critical mold spare parts can be stored in assigned compartments with low-stock reminders.

Q7: Can cutting tools for mold machining be managed?
A7: Yes. CNC cutting tools such as end mills, drills, taps and inserts can be managed in CNC tool vending machines.

Q8: Can drawer layouts be customized?
A8: Yes. Drawer and compartment layouts can be customized for gauges, small tools and precision mold components.

Q9: Can the system export reports?
A9: Yes. Usage and inventory reports can support maintenance review, purchasing and cost tracking.

Q10: Is it suitable for injection molding factories?
A10: Yes. It is suitable for injection molding plants that manage molds, repair tools, spare parts and production consumables.

products.name_en: Electronics, Semiconductor, Electrical and Optical Manufacturing
products.title_en: Smart Cabinet Solution for Electronics, Semiconductor and ESD Supplies Management
products.description_en: Electronics, semiconductor, electrical and optical manufacturing sites use many small tools, ESD supplies, labels, connectors and production consumables. Smart cabinets help manage high-frequency items near production lines and improve material traceability.
products.features_en:
• Improve line-side inventory visibility
• Control ESD and production consumable distribution
• Reduce over-collection of small consumables
• Support department and production line usage reports
• Customize compartments for small tools and mixed SKUs
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can be managed in electronics manufacturing?
A1: The system can manage ESD gloves, finger cots, wipes, labels, tweezers, soldering tips, connectors, terminals, cable ties and small tools.

Q2: Can ESD supplies be controlled by employee?
A2: Yes. PPE and ESD consumables can be issued by employee, department, line or item category.

Q3: Can pickup limits be set for consumables?
A3: Yes. Collection frequency and quantity limits can be set for gloves, wipes, finger cots and other high-frequency items.

Q4: Is it suitable for semiconductor production?
A4: Yes. Cabinet layout and workflow can be adapted for semiconductor support areas and clean production supply management.

Q5: Can it manage small tools?
A5: Yes. Drawer and locker cabinets can manage tweezers, screwdrivers, soldering tools, inspection tools and small fixtures.

Q6: Can inventory reports be exported by line?
A6: Yes. Reports can be exported by production line, department, employee or item category.

Q7: Can the cabinet manage labels and packaging consumables?
A7: Yes. Labels, tapes, packaging accessories and other production consumables can be managed in compartments or lockers.

Q8: Can different departments have different access?
A8: Yes. User permissions can be set by department, role or item type.

Q9: Can low-stock alerts be used for line-side supplies?
A9: Yes. Low-stock alerts help replenish high-frequency production materials before shortages affect production.

Q10: Can cabinet size be customized?
A10: Yes. Cabinet size, locker quantity, drawer layout and storage structure can be customized for small SKUs and mixed materials.

products.title_en: Industrial Vending Machine Solution for Automotive and EV Components Manufacturing
products.description_en: Automotive and EV components factories need stable access to tools, PPE, fasteners, spare parts and maintenance supplies across assembly lines, machining areas and maintenance departments. Smart vending cabinets help standardize material issuing and improve inventory visibility.
products.features_en:
• Improve line-side material availability
• Reduce uncontrolled pickup of PPE and consumables
• Support multi-shift production material management
• Track usage by employee, line and department
• Provide reports for lean manufacturing and cost control
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can be managed in automotive factories?
A1: The system can manage tools, torque tools, sockets, PPE, fasteners, spare parts, labels, cable ties and MRO supplies.

Q2: Can the system support multi-shift production?
A2: Yes. Authorized employees can collect approved materials at any time, while each pickup is recorded automatically.

Q3: Can it manage line-side fasteners?
A3: Yes. Fastener vending machines or weight-based cabinets can manage screws, nuts, bolts, washers and other high-frequency small parts.

Q4: Can PPE pickup be controlled?
A4: Yes. PPE pickup can be controlled by employee, department, item category and collection frequency.

Q5: Can cabinet data support lean manufacturing?
A5: Yes. Usage reports help analyze consumption by line, department or item category, supporting lean material control.

Q6: Can spare parts be managed for maintenance teams?
A6: Yes. Smart lockers can store sensors, belts, fittings, repair kits and other maintenance spare parts.

Q7: Can the system connect with ERP or MES?
A7: ERP, MES, SAP and other systems can be integrated according to project requirements.

Q8: Can cabinets be deployed across different workshops?
A8: Yes. Multiple cabinets can be installed in assembly, machining, maintenance and warehouse areas.

Q9: Can cabinet appearance be customized?
A9: Yes. Cabinet color, logo area, screen interface and locker layout can be customized.

Q10: Is it suitable for EV components factories?
A10: Yes. It is suitable for battery component, motor, electronics, assembly and machining support areas in EV supply chains.

products.name_en: Medical Device and Life Science Equipment Manufacturing
products.title_en: Smart Cabinet Solution for Medical Device Manufacturing Supplies and PPE
products.description_en: Medical device and life science equipment manufacturers need controlled access to PPE, tools, gauges, labels and production consumables. Smart cabinets help organize materials, record pickup and improve visibility for clean and regulated production environments.
products.features_en:
• Improve controlled access to PPE and production supplies
• Support traceable pickup records for internal review
• Organize small tools, gauges and clean production materials
• Reduce manual issuing work for admin and warehouse teams
• Customize cabinet layout for clean production workflows
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can be managed for medical device manufacturing?
A1: The system can manage gloves, masks, wipes, labels, gauges, calipers, hand tools, packaging aids, small spare parts and PPE.

Q2: Can PPE distribution be controlled?
A2: Yes. PPE collection can be controlled by employee, department, item category and collection frequency.

Q3: Can the cabinet manage gauges and inspection tools?
A3: Yes. Smart drawer cabinets can store gauges, calipers and inspection tools with checkout and return records.

Q4: Can usage records be exported?
A4: Yes. Pickup records, inventory changes and usage reports can be exported for internal review and inventory control.

Q5: Can the system support clean production workflows?
A5: Cabinet layout, access workflow and item categories can be customized for clean production support areas.

Q6: Can different departments have different permissions?
A6: Yes. Permissions can be set by department, employee role or item type.

Q7: Can low-stock alerts be set for production consumables?
A7: Yes. Minimum stock levels can be set for gloves, labels, wipes and other consumables.

Q8: Can the cabinet reduce manual supply distribution?
A8: Yes. Employees can collect approved items by themselves, reducing manual work for admin or warehouse teams.

Q9: Can cabinet materials or color be customized?
A9: Cabinet color, size, compartment layout and workflow can be customized according to project needs.

Q10: Is this suitable for life science equipment factories?
A10: Yes. It is suitable for factories producing laboratory equipment, medical devices and life science instruments.

products.name_en: New Materials, Cable and Functional Materials Manufacturing
products.title_en: Smart Cabinet Solution for New Materials, Cable and Functional Materials Manufacturing
products.description_en: New materials, cable and functional materials manufacturers often manage mixed production tools, testing supplies, chemical bottles, samples, PPE and maintenance parts. Smart cabinets help control access, organize materials and provide usage records across production, lab and maintenance areas.
products.features_en:
• Manage production, lab and maintenance materials in one system
• Support controlled access for chemicals and safety supplies
• Improve inventory visibility across workshops and labs
• Reduce manual issuing and stock-checking workload
• Customize cabinet type according to material properties
products.faq_en:
Q1: What materials can be managed in new materials factories?
A1: The system can manage production tools, PPE, chemical bottles, lab samples, spare parts, labels, fittings and MRO supplies.

Q2: Can chemical bottles be stored in the cabinet?
A2: Yes. Chemical bottles and reagents can be managed with suitable cabinet configuration. Refrigerated or safety options should be confirmed based on material properties.

Q3: Can production and lab materials be managed together?
A3: Yes. Different cabinet types can be used for production workshops, laboratories, testing rooms and maintenance areas.

Q4: Can the system control access to sensitive materials?
A4: Yes. Access permissions can be set by employee, department, project or material category.

Q5: Can PPE and safety supplies be included?
A5: Yes. PPE vending cabinets can manage gloves, masks, safety glasses and other protective supplies.

Q6: Can spare parts and MRO supplies be tracked?
A6: Yes. Spare parts, sensors, fittings and maintenance kits can be stored in smart lockers or industrial supplies cabinets.

Q7: Can low-stock alerts be set?
A7: Yes. Each item can have minimum stock and warning stock settings for replenishment management.

Q8: Can the cabinet be customized for cable manufacturing?
A8: Yes. Locker size, storage layout and item categories can be customized for cable accessories, tools and consumables.

Q9: Can usage reports be exported?
A9: Yes. Reports can be exported by user, department, project or material category.

Q10: What should be confirmed for chemical storage?
A10: Bottle size, material type, temperature, ventilation, safety requirements and access process should be confirmed before production.

products.title_en: Custom Industrial Vending Machine and Smart Cabinet Solutions
products.description_en:
Our Custom Industrial Vending Machine Solutions are designed for factories and businesses that need a smart cabinet system beyond standard models. We can customize cabinet size, locker quantity, drawer layout, weighing shelves, RFID tracking, refrigerated storage, heating modules and software workflow according to different materials and application scenarios.

Whether you need to manage CNC tools, PPE, spare parts, fasteners, documents, office supplies, chemical bottles, food pickup or reusable assets, we can provide a flexible smart cabinet solution with controlled access, usage records, inventory tracking, low-stock alerts and system integration.
products.features_en:
• Custom smart cabinet solutions for tools, PPE, spare parts, fasteners and MRO supplies
• Cabinet size, locker quantity, drawer layout and compartment size can be customized
• Supports vending, locker, drawer, weighing, RFID, refrigerated and heated cabinet modules
• Suitable for special materials that standard cabinets cannot manage
• Controlled access by employee card, PIN code, QR code or face recognition
• Supports item pickup, return tracking, inventory records and low-stock alerts
• Software workflow can be customized by employee, department, machine, project or cost center
• ERP, MES, SAP, OA and warehouse management system integration can be customized
• Suitable for factories, laboratories, offices, warehouses, smart buildings and special projects
products.faq_en:
Q1: What types of smart cabinets can be customized?
A1: We can customize tool vending machines, PPE vending cabinets, smart locker cabinets, drawer cabinets, weighing cabinets, RFID cabinets, refrigerated cabinets, food pickup lockers and combined cabinet systems.

Q2: Can the cabinet size and locker layout be customized?
A2: Yes. Cabinet dimensions, locker size, drawer quantity, compartment layout, channel quantity and internal structure can be designed according to the material size and storage method.

Q3: Can the software workflow be customized?
A3: Yes. The workflow can include employee login, item pickup, return tracking, approval process, collection limits, low-stock alerts, report export and system integration.

Q4: Can the cabinet manage special materials?
A4: Yes. If standard cabinets are not suitable, we can design custom storage modules for special tools, large items, chemical bottles, reusable assets or materials with unique storage requirements.

Q5: Can it connect with ERP, MES or SAP?
A5: Yes. ERP, MES, SAP, OA, WMS and other systems can be integrated according to project requirements.
